blocks.text: Norway's golden Friday: Reitan hunts top five, Bø battles in Kontiolahti
⛷️ 16:10 — Biathlon Men's 20km Individual, Kontiolahti — Johannes Thingnes Bø leads Norway's charge
🏅 20:00 — Paralympic Winter Games 2026 Opening Ceremony, Milan

After Bodø/Glimt's stunning 2-1 win over Internazionale on Tuesday, Norwegian sport has serious momentum. The weekend delivers the full package — Barça, Arsenal's title race, and the fiercest London derby.
